title: melastoma litoreum
intro: Melastoma litoreum, also known as the river buttonbush or buttonbush, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Melastomataceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antidiarrheal effects. The health benefits of Melastoma litoreum include treating digestive issues, fever, and skin infections, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs in traditional folk medicine.
